title: Automated Threat Response
body:
## Description
Implement automated responses to threats

## Response Actions
- [ ] Auto-block IPs on blocklist
- [ ] Quarantine pods with malicious images
- [ ] Rate-limit suspicious sources
- [ ] Alert on threat detection
- [ ] Create incident tickets automatically

**Priority:** Medium
**Effort:** Large (1-2 weeks)
**Phase:** Phase 6 - Threat Intelligence
**Week:** 32
